## 1. Role Justification

The Backend Engineer is a mid-level role focused on PlayFab SDK integration, Cloud Script development, API wrapper implementation, and data pipeline maintenance. This is a P1 hire required for Stage 5 (Full Production). The role reports to Priya Nair (Senior Backend Engineer, G14), implementing PlayFab integrations, writing Cloud Script functions, maintaining API wrappers and data pipelines.

This hire provides additional implementation capacity for backend work, enabling Priya Nair to focus on architecture while Aisha handles implementation details.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 5 (PlayFab Integration), 7 (Cloud Script Development), 10 (Data Pipeline Operations)

---

## 2. Required Competencies (weighted)

| Competency              | Weight | Minimum Threshold | Assessment Method             |
| ----------------------- | ------ | ----------------- | ----------------------------- |
| PlayFab SDK Integration | 30%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | PlayFab integration exercise  |
| Cloud Script (C#)       | 25%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | Cloud Script coding challenge |
| API Wrapper Design      | 20%    | ≥ 3/5             | API design exercise           |
| Data Pipeline           | 15%    | ≥ 3/5             | Pipeline design exercise      |
| Team Collaboration      | 10%    | ≥ 3/5             | Behavioral interview          |

---

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 2+ years backend development with game backend focus
- PlayFab SDK integration experience (authentication, economy, cloud script)
- Cloud Script development in C# (economy transactions, player progression)
- API wrapper/abstraction layer design
- Data pipeline experience (event streaming, analytics data flow)
